Published Research
HVAC · Revenue Diagnostics Mar 16, 2026 11 min read
How Much Should an HVAC Company Spend on Marketing in 2026?

Most owners are spending $8K–$15K/month without knowing their cost per booked job. Here's the actual math - benchmarks, a 5-step budget formula, and the three places HVAC companies silently leak marketing budget.

HVAC · Pipeline Systems Mar 17, 2026
Why Your HVAC CSRs Are Losing You $300K/Year (Without Anyone Noticing)

Your phones are answered. Your CSRs are friendly. And you're still losing $300K a year in calls that never became booked jobs. Here's exactly where it's happening and the three fixes that recover most of it.

Roofing · Lead Sources
Why Angi Leads Feel Like Garbage (And What Roofing Companies Do Instead)

Angi leads have a 12-18% close rate industry-wide. But some roofing companies close 35% of them. The difference is what happens in the first 4 minutes after the call comes in.
